zh.lifeSummary: 當Humphrey Colquhoun 4th Colquhoun of Ilk於1280年出生在英國蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾度巴頓時，他的父親Ingelram Colquhoun Ingleramus 3rd of Colquhoun25歲，母親Mrs. Katherine Colquhoun30歲。他和Lady Helen Catherine Graham至少有2個兒子。他於1314年登記服兵役。他去世於1330年在他的家鄉享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: Colquhoun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the barony of Colquhoun in Dumbartonshire. The name appears to derive from Gaelic còil, cùil ‘nook, corner’, or coill(e) ‘wood’ + cumhann ‘narrow’. The usual Scottish pronunciation is ka-hoon. This is the name of a Scottish family descended from Umfridus de Kilpatrick, who acquired lands in the barony of Colquhoun during the reign of Alexander II (1214–49).

variants.name: Cohoon
meanings: English (Cheshire) and Scottish: variant of   Colquhoun  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Calhoun
meanings: History: This prominent early American name was brought across the Atlantic Ocean by Scotch-Irish pioneers who entered Pennsylvania c. 1733. The American statesman John c. Calhoun (1782–1850), born in Abbeville District, SC, served in both houses of Congress, was secretary of war, and vice president of the US (1825–32).

variants.name: Cahoon
meanings: Irish (Down and Antrim): variant (reflecting the traditional pronunciation) of Scottish   Colquhoun  .

nameMeanings.name: Humphrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Humphrey Colquhoun 4th Colquhoun of Ilk was born in 1280, in Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Ingelram Colquhoun Ingleramus 3rd of Colquhoun, was 25 and his mother, Mrs. Katherine Colquhoun, was 30. He had at least 2 sons with Lady Helen Catherine Graham. He registered for military service in 1314. He died in 1330, in his hometown, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Humphrey Colquhoun 4th Colquhoun of Ilk est né en 1280, à Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ingelram Colquhoun Ingleramus 3rd of Colquhoun, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Katherine Colquhoun, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Lady Helen Catherine Graham. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1314. Il est décédé en 1330, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Humphrey Colquhoun 4th Colquhoun of Ilk 1280 in Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ingelram Colquhoun Ingleramus 3rd of Colquhoun 25 und seine Mutter Mrs. Katherine Colquhoun 30. Er hatte mit Lady Helen Catherine Graham mindestens 2 Söhne. Er hat sich 1314 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1330 im Alter von 50 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Humphrey Colquhoun 4th Colquhoun of Ilk è nato il nel 1280 nel Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ingelram Colquhoun Ingleramus 3rd of Colquhoun, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Katherine Colquhoun, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Lady Helen Catherine Graham. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1314. Morì nel 1330, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Humphrey Colquhoun 4th Colquhoun of Ilkが1280年にイギリススコットランドダンバートンシュアイアダンバートンで生まれた時，父Ingelram Colquhoun Ingleramus 3rd of Colquhounは25歳，母Mrs. Katherine Colquhounは30歳であった。彼はLady Helen Catherine Grahamとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1314年に兵役登録をした。彼は1330年に故郷で50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Humphrey Colquhoun 4th Colquhoun of Ilk(이)가 1280년 영국 스코틀랜드 던바토실르 드바턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ingelram Colquhoun Ingleramus 3rd of Colquhoun(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Katherine Colquhoun(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Lady Helen Catherine Graham(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1314년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1330년 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Humphrey Colquhoun 4th Colquhoun of Ilk nasceu em 1280, em Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ingelram Colquhoun Ingleramus 3rd of Colquhoun, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Katherine Colquhoun, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Lady Helen Catherine Graham. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1314. Ele faleceu em 1330, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Humphrey Colquhoun 4th Colquhoun of Ilk родился в 1280 г. в местности думбартон, дунбартоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ingelram Colquhoun Ingleramus 3rd of Colquhoun было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Katherine Colquhoun, 30. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Lady Helen Catherine Graham. В 1314 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1330 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Humphrey Colquhoun 4th Colquhoun of Ilk nació en 1280, en Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Ingelram Colquhoun Ingleramus 3rd of Colquhoun, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Mrs. Katherine Colquhoun, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Lady Helen Catherine Graham. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1314. Murió en 1330, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años.
